markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Alberto Gonzalez wins the Gonzalez vs Bennaton professional tennis match in the 2026 Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Americas Round after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Gonzalez vs Bennaton professional tennis match in the 2026 Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Americas Round after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Alberto Gonzalez win the Gonzalez vs Bennaton: Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Americas Round match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Rae Burrell records 3+ three pointers in the Indiana at Los Angeles women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 8, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Indiana at Los Angeles women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 8, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's threes recorded.
markets.title: Rae Burrell: 3+ threes

markets.rules_primary: If the end-of-day Nasdaq 100 index value on July 08, 2026 is above 29289.99, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market will close on July 08, 2026. The market will expire at the sooner of the first release of the data, or one week after July 08, 2026.

Pursuant to the Kalshi Rulebook, the Exchange has modified the Source Agency and Underlying for indices markets. See the rules for more information.
